query_title: We Still Kill the Old Way

recommendations.title: The Working Class Goes to Heaven
recommendations.overview: After losing a finger in a work accident, an Italian worker becomes increasingly involved in political and revolutionary groups.

recommendations.title: One Way or Another
recommendations.overview: Set during a retreat of Christian Democrat politicians who practice spiritual exercises together, it is an allegory of corrupted power. Disturbing, claustrophobic settings are the background to a series of mysterious crimes.

recommendations.title: Investigation of a Citizen Above Suspicion
recommendations.overview: Rome, Italy. After committing a heinous crime, a senior police officer exposes evidence incriminating him because his moral commitment prevents him from circumventing the law and the social order it protects.

recommendations.title: The 10th Victim
recommendations.overview: In the near future, big wars are avoided by giving individuals with violent tendencies a chance to kill in the Big Hunt. The Hunt is the most popular form of entertainment in the world and also attracts participants who are looking for fame and fortu

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: The Godfather Part III
recommendations.overview: In the midst of trying to legitimize his business dealings in 1979 New York and Italy, aging mafia don, Michael Corleone seeks forgiveness for his sins while taking a young protege under his wing.

recommendations.title: The Silence of the Marsh
recommendations.overview: A successful, cold-blooded crime novelist gets involved in a kidnapping case while uncovering the corrupt ties between politicians and the local mafia in Valencia, Spain.

recommendations.title: Safe
recommendations.overview: After a former elite agent rescues a 12-year-old Chinese girl who's been abducted, they find themselves in the middle of a standoff between Triads, the Russian Mafia and high-level corrupt New York City politicians and police.

recommendations.title: The Lady from Shanghai
recommendations.overview: A romantic drifter gets caught between a corrupt tycoon and his voluptuous wife.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.
